=Module <<a_api_type subproject="client" | module Types >> =
<<pre class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|module>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Types>>>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~:>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|sig>><<a_api subproject="client" text=".." | module Types >><<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|end>>>>~Types related to users~.

----
<<pre class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|module>> <<a_api subproject="client" text="User" | module Types.User >> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~:>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|sig>><<a_api subproject="client" text=".." | module Types.User >><<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|end>>>>
~Types related to action link keys
<<pre class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|module>> <<a_api subproject="client" text="Action_link_key" | module Types.Action_link_key >> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~:>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|sig>><<a_api subproject="client" text=".." | module Types.Action_link_key >><<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|end>>>><<pre class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|module>> <<a_api subproject="client" text="Group" | module Types.Group >> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~:>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|sig>><<a_api subproject="client" text=".." | module Types.Group >><<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|end>>>>
